features.name: Teacher View
features.description: Main interface for teachers to present slides, annotate, and manage classroom sessions.

features.name: Student View
features.description: Interface for students to view slides, take quizzes, and track progress.

features.name: Digital Board Tools
features.description: Canvas and toolbar components for drawing and annotations.

features.name: PDF Generation
features.description: Service and components for generating PDF reports and notes.

features.name: Storage Service
features.description: Service for handling data persistence with Supabase or local storage.
